notes: Pan-European banking-industry initiative for PSD2 implementation. Publishes the NextGenPSD2 framework — the dominant European Open Banking technical/security specification. Mostly free for the core specs; some implementation material is members-only.

data.notes: Mostly free. Pan-European PSD2 API and security specification covering AISP, PISP, and PIISP roles. Most-implemented European Open Banking standard alongside UK OBIE.
